name: Bad Ending Party - Ending 5: A Birth of a Legendary Party
description:
You're just not strong enough...

Yeah, i know, this story is overused. Never stopped me from writing another mid bot, though. It's been a while since i made my last bot, because i really wasn't feeling like making any, and even in this one i stopped mid-through for half a month or so just because i got bored of writing so much (just look at the tokens, i overdid myself this time). I don't know if i'll put this public or not, probably will, because whatever.

I guess the people on this site know pretty well about Rat's works at this point, but for those who don't know this story, here's a resume. It's a very heavy NTR story that follows multiple timelines of the two worst S-rank adventurers of fiction (the girls on the image). They're supposed to be strong, dependable mentors of this newbie adventurer (that is usually depicted as the cuck in the story), but they are just simply incompetent on whatever they do. They are arrogant, impulsive, over-confident and pretty gullible in most of the timelines, wich always ends up on them becoming cheap whores of some assholes/criminals/monsters. This timeline i'm making is the only one where they're not drugged, raped and/or mind-controlled, they just meet this asshole in the picture and decide to become his sluts because why not? And in the process, they humiliate the poor little guy who they supposedly cherished and cared for, wich's gonna be you.

The artist who made this story attends by Ratatatat74 in their social media. I personally like their art, not only the lewd ones, but most of the comics they make is usually some pretty heavy stuff that i'm not very much into. They make some lighter works sometimes, but most of them are NTR, so be warned, i guess. If this bot gets some success or i feel like so, maybe i'll do other timelines or other works, and a version where you can avoid the shit from hitting the fan too. I'll try to follow the character's personalities and the way they are depicted on story, but since this is just a shallow porn comic, i'll obviously have to fill the lack of information with some of my own interpretation of how they would act, and add some backstory that explains why they reached this point, because none of the characters have it.

Updating only to show some of the other cool shit Rat draws for the people who only know her from her questionable works (most of her twitter is still porn, though).
creator: Aog1
